sentences.target: Je change de profession cette année.

translations.fr: Je change de profession cette année.
translations.es: Voy a cambiar de profesión este año.
translations.de: Ich wechsle dieses Jahr den Beruf.
translations.ru: Я сменю профессию в этом году.
translations.pt: Vou mudar de profissão este ano.
translations.nl: Ik verander dit jaar van beroep.
translations.hi: मैं इस साल अपना पेशा बदल रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: 今年は職業を変えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb 'change'.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; takes the complement pattern 'changer de + NOUN'.
Preposition introducing the complement 'de profession' after 'changer'.
Common feminine noun; object of the preposition 'de'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'année'.
Common feminine noun; temporal adjunct indicating 'this year'.

sentences.target: Il demande ma profession au guichet.

translations.fr: Il demande ma profession au guichet.
translations.en: He asks for my profession at the counter.
translations.es: En el mostrador me pregunta cuál es mi profesión.
translations.de: Er fragt am Schalter nach meinem Beruf.
translations.it: Allo sportello chiede la mia professione.
translations.ru: У стойки он спрашивает, кем я работаю.
translations.pt: Ele pergunta minha profissão no balcão.
translations.he: הוא שואל מה המקצוע שלי בדלפק.
translations.vi: Anh ấy hỏi nghề nghiệp của tôi ở quầy.
translations.nl: Hij vraagt bij de balie naar mijn beroep.
translations.uk: Він запитує на стійці про мою професію.
translations.hi: काउंटर पर वह मेरे पेशे के बारे में पूछता है.
translations.pl: Przy okienku pyta o mój zawód.
translations.el: Στο γκισέ ρωτάει ποιο είναι το επάγγελμά μου.
translations.nb: Ved skranken spør han om yrket mitt.
translations.id: Di loket dia menanyakan profesi saya.
translations.sv: Vid disken frågar han om mitt yrke.
translations.ro: La ghișeu, el întreabă care este profesia mea.
translations.cs: U přepážky se ptá na mou profesi.
translations.da: Ved skranken spørger han om mit erhverv.
translations.ja: 窓口で彼は私の職業を尋ねます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; subject of 'demande'.
Transitive verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object 'ma profession' and a locative PP 'au guichet'.
1st person singular possessive determiner; agrees with the feminine noun 'profession'.
Common feminine noun; direct object of 'demande'.
Contraction of the preposition 'à' and the definite article 'le'; introduces a locative complement.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'au'.

translations.it: Gli piace molto la sua professione.
translations.ko: 그 사람은 자신의 직업을 정말 좋아합니다.
translations.pt: Ele gosta muito da sua profissão.
translations.he: הוא מאוד אוהב את המקצוע שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy rất thích nghề của mình.
translations.nl: Hij vindt zijn beroep erg leuk.
translations.hi: वह अपना पेशा बहुत पसंद करता है.
translations.el: Του αρέσει πολύ το επάγγελμά του.
translations.nb: Han liker yrket sitt veldig godt.
translations.sv: Han tycker mycket om sitt yrke.
translations.ro: Îi place foarte mult profesia lui.
translations.da: Han kan rigtig godt lide sit erhverv.
translations.ja: その人は自分の仕事がとても好きです。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular possessive determiner; feminine singular form modifying 'profession'.
Common feminine noun; grammatical subject of 'plaît'.
Clitic indirect object (dative) pronoun; complements 'plaire' ('plaire à quelqu’un').
Intransitive verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a dative experiencer ('lui').
Degree adverb modifying the verb 'plaît'.

sentences.target: On parle de ma profession pendant le dîner.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl də ma pʁɔ.fɛ.sjɔ̃ pɑ̃.dɑ̃ lə di.ne/

translations.fr: On parle de ma profession pendant le dîner.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl də ma pʁɔ.fɛ.sjɔ̃ pɑ̃.dɑ̃ lə di.ne/
translations.en: We talk about my profession during dinner.
translations.es: Durante la cena hablamos de mi profesión.
translations.de: Beim Abendessen sprechen wir über meinen Beruf.
translations.it: Durante la cena parliamo della mia professione.
translations.ko: 저녁 식사 때 내 직업에 대해 이야기해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 晚餐时我们谈论我的职业。
translations.yue: 晚飯時我哋討論我嘅職業。
translations.ru: За ужином мы говорим о моей профессии.
translations.pt: Durante o jantar, falamos sobre a minha profissão.
translations.he: במהלך הארוחה אנחנו מדברים על המקצוע שלי.
translations.vi: Trong bữa tối, chúng tôi nói về nghề của tôi.
translations.nl: Tijdens het avondeten praten we over mijn beroep.
translations.uk: Під час вечері ми говоримо про мою професію.
translations.hi: रात के खाने के दौरान हम मेरे पेशे के बारे में बात करते हैं.
translations.pl: Podczas kolacji rozmawiamy o moim zawodzie.
translations.el: Κατά τη διάρκεια του δείπνου μιλάμε για το επάγγελμά μου.
translations.nb: Under middagen snakker vi om yrket mitt.
translations.id: Saat makan malam kami membicarakan profesi saya.
translations.sv: Under middagen pratar vi om mitt yrke.
translations.ro: La cină vorbim despre profesia mea.
translations.cs: Během večeře mluvíme o mé profesi.
translations.da: Under aftensmaden taler vi om mit erhverv.
translations.ja: 夕食のときに私の職業について話します。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/indefinite subject pronoun (often colloquial 'we'); subject of 'parle'.
Intransitive verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; used with the preposition 'de' to mark the topic.
Preposition introducing the topic complement 'de ma profession'.
1st person singular possessive determiner; modifies 'profession'.
Common feminine noun; complement (object) of the preposition 'de'.
Preposition marking time; introduces the temporal phrase 'pendant le dîner'.
Definite article; determiner for the noun 'dîner' within the prepositional phrase.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'pendant'.
